name: Scheduled DB Vacuum & Analyze
description: Run VACUUM ANALYZE on key PostgreSQL tables weekly to reclaim space and update query planner statistics. Reports table sizes before and after.
author: platform

config.sql: SELECT tablename, pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(schemaname || '.' || tablename)) AS size FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname = 'public' ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size(schemaname || '.' || tablename) DESC LIMIT 10
VACUUM ANALYZE events; VACUUM ANALYZE execution_steps; VACUUM ANALYZE audit_logs; VACUUM ANALYZE workflow_executions;

config.subject: Weekly DB Maintenance Complete
config.html:
Database Maintenance Complete

Top Table Sizes
